indications.text:
OPFOLDA is indicated, in combination with Pombiliti, for the treatment of adult patients with
late-onset Pompe disease (lysosomal acid alpha-glucosidase [GAA] deficiency) weighing ≥40 kg
and who are not improving on their current enzyme replacement therapy (ERT).

OPFOLDA is indicated, in combination with Pombiliti, for the treatment of adult patients with
late-onset Pompe disease (lysosomal acid alpha-glucosidase [GAA] deficiency) weighing ≥40 kg
and who are not improving on their current enzyme replacement therapy (ERT).
